The '''HD7 Hyperdrive Activator Unit''' was a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Engine/Legends|engine]] manufactured by [[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus Spaceworks]]. The unit was a Class One rated unit, and was used in both<ref name="EGVV" /> the [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class Xg- Star Wing]]<ref name="TSC">{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}}</ref> and the [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]]. The [[Engine/Legends|engine]] was installed on the ''Sentinel''-class landing craft, giving the ship an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] speed of one thousand [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]], and speed comparable to a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] in [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]].<ref name="EGVV" />
